description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a minimalist design. The front face displays a combination of a single door on the left and three horizontal drawers on the right, each with subtle integrated handles. The cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with no visible ornamentation or glass panels, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic. The overall build suggests it is suitable for storing household or office items, with ample internal compartment space. Its neutral color and simple lines make it versatile for various urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways.
description: A light wood, minimalist sideboard cabinet with one door and three drawers, standing on four short legs. Its smooth, matte finish and integrated handles give it a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing one door on the left and three drawers on the right, all with integrated handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel and two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back panel and all four legs.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain wooden panel and two visible legs, mirroring the left side.
